title: Incident summary
description: Produce a tight incident readout: what happened, blast radius, mitigation, next step.
instructions: Lead with the one-sentence summary of what is broken right now.
Then: scope (services/users affected), mitigation in flight, owner, next checkpoint.
Call out reversible vs. irreversible steps before recommending them.
risk_notes: Never recommend a destructive operation without an explicit rollback plan.
